disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are disabled. If the requested touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN status).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint names that are disabled. If the requested sub-touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN status).

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configurations. Each defines offer display rules for specific touchpoints in the app. If no touchpoint matches the requested one, falls back to a touchpoint named 'default'.

names.description: List of alternative touchpoint identifiers. If the requested touchpoint matches any name in this list, this touchpoint configuration is used. Provides an alternative to the single 'name' field for matching multiple touchpoints to the same configuration.

name.description: Primary touchpoint identifier. Used to match against the requested touchpoint. If no touchpoint matches, falls back to a touchpoint named 'default'.

info.description: Array of offer configurations for this touchpoint. Each item defines screens, session tracking, launch logic conditions, and offer display parameters. The system iterates through them in order and selects the first one whose launch logic conditions pass.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after offer interaction. Passed through to the UI layer.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic rule sets. Each rule set defines conditions that must ALL be met (AND logic). The offer is shown if ANY rule set passes (OR logic between sets). If empty, the offer is shown without condition checks.

should_replace_with_ad.description: If true, replaces the offer with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad is available for this touchpoint. Defaults to false.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: If true, replaces the offer with a rewarded ad for credits. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad for credits is available for this touchpoint. Defaults to false.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no lower bound. Both min and max set to -1 disables this check.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum editor-done count (inclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no lower bound. Both min and max set to -1 disables this check.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no upper bound. Both start and end set to -1 disables this check.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum editor-done count (exclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no upper bound. Both min and max set to -1 disables this check.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum offer session count (inclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination. Value of -1 means no lower bound. Both start and end set to -1 disables this check.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. If not empty, the user must have had a subscription for at least one of these packages (checked against purchase history) for the offer to be shown.

user_had_subscription.description: Whether the user must have had a prior subscription. If null/absent, this check is skipped. If true, user must have had a subscription. If false, user must not have had a subscription.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: If true, replaces the offer with a reward interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad is available for this touchpoint. Defaults to false.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (inclusive) for the offer to be shown, tracked by session_key. Value of -1 means no lower bound. Skipped if session_key is empty.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no upper bound. Both min and max set to -1 disables this check.

is_ai_credit.description: Filter for AI credit flow state. If null/absent, this check is skipped. If true, the offer only shows when the user is in a credit flow. If false, the offer only shows when the user is not in a credit flow.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen at the launch logic level. Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: Modulo value for key session count. When set (not -1), the offer only shows when (keySessionCount + 1) % (repeatKeySession + 1) == 0. Value of -1 disables this check. Skipped if session_key is empty.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no lower bound. Both min and max set to -1 disables this check.

is_store_available.description: Whether the Google Play Store payment type must be available. Checked against the device's active payment types. Defaults to true.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key session count (exclusive) for the offer to be shown, tracked by session_key. Value of -1 means no upper bound. Skipped if session_key is empty.

repeat_session.description: Modulo value for app session count. When set (not -1), the offer only shows when app session count is divisible by this value. Value of -1 disables this check.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier for the offer screen at the launch logic level. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint; used only when offer_screen_touchpoint is not present.

restricted_packages.description: List of package/offer pairs for promotional offer eligibility checks. If not empty, all entries must pass the eligibility check (isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer) for the offer to be shown.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier to check for promotional offer eligibility.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier to check eligibility for within the specified package.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type strings the user must currently have. If empty, this check is skipped. If the user is subscribed, their tier type must be in this list. If the user is not subscribed, 'free' must be in the list for the check to pass.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no lower bound. Both start and end set to -1 disables this check.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. Value of -1 means no daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: If true, replaces the offer with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for this touchpoint. Defaults to false.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: If true, the offer is skipped when the one-day pass cooldown period has not yet passed. If null/absent or false, cooldown is not checked.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum offer session count (exclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination. Value of -1 means no upper bound. Both start and end set to -1 disables this check.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum device storage usage percentage (exclusive) for the offer to be shown. Value of -1 means no upper bound. Both min and max set to -1 disables this check.

offer_variant.description: Variant identifier for the offer screen. Passed through to the UI layer for selecting which offer screen variant to display.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer. Used to construct a composite key for session tracking by joining with the touchpoint name (e.g. 'touchpoint.screen1.screen2').

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen to display. Takes precedence over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present.

session_key.description: Key used for tracking offer display sessions independently. Used for key_session_start/key_session_end range checks and repeat_key_session modulo logic. If empty, key session checks are skipped.

is_one_time_offer.description: Whether this offer is a one-time purchase offer. Defaults to false. Passed to the UI layer as part of OneTimePurchaseDetails.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier for the offer screen to display. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint; used only when offer_screen_touchpoint is not present.
